swarms.name: I/O Ledger and Movement Swarm
swarms.mission: Build accounts, wallets, double-entry ledger, transfers, escrow, custody, clearing, settlement, reconciliation, revenue routing and audit events.

swarms.name: Market Core Swarm
swarms.mission: Build the universal market-object registry, listings, requests, quotes, bids, matching, negotiation, orders, contracts and dispute states.

swarms.name: Auction, Bidding and Barter Swarm
swarms.mission: Implement open and sealed bidding, English, Dutch, reverse and double auctions, direct and multi-party barter, swaps and cooperative trades.

swarms.name: CAPITAL Product Swarm
swarms.mission: Build the CAPITAL web and mobile product shell, market navigation, portfolios, watchlists, order workflows, user dashboards and domain adapters.

swarms.name: Real Economy Markets Swarm
swarms.mission: Implement commodities, agriculture, food, livestock, metals, energy, recyclables, reusables, industrial by-products, logistics and quality grading.

swarms.name: Digital and Financial Markets Swarm
swarms.mission: Design regulated adapters for forex, securities, crypto, DeFi, futures, derivatives, tokenized assets and custody without enabling unlicensed execution.

swarms.name: Carbon and Environmental Markets Swarm
swarms.mission: Build carbon-credit, offset, allowance, retirement, environmental-unit, registry and integrity workflows with double-counting protection.

swarms.name: AI, Capability and Ideas Swarm
swarms.mission: Build markets for AI services, compute, data, consented human and institutional capabilities, ideas, IP, licences, royalties and protected disclosure.

swarms.name: Risk, Compliance and Market Integrity Swarm
swarms.mission: Create market classification, jurisdiction rules, KYC/KYB hooks, sanctions controls, suitability, surveillance, fraud detection, restricted-market and non-commercial allocation policies.

swarms.name: Trading-as-a-Service Swarm
swarms.mission: Expose safe external APIs, SDKs, webhooks, embedded components, tenant isolation, white-label markets, billing and managed-market administration.

swarms.name: Trade Proof and Actualization Swarm
swarms.mission: Link ownership, origin, quality, delivery, settlement, registry transfer, environmental retirement and achieved outcomes to Proof and Actual.

swarms.name: Trading DevSecOps and QA Swarm
swarms.mission: Provide CI, schema validation, migrations, tests, security scanning, observability, performance testing, release gates and incident playbooks.
